headline: Arthur J. Gallagher Expands UK Reach With Bridge Acquisition Before Earnings
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) has agreed to acquire UK based Bridge Insurance Brokers Limited. The deal adds Bridge’s sector focused brokerage operations to Gallagher’s existing global insurance and risk management platform. The acquisition comes ahead of Arthur J. Gallagher’s upcoming earnings release. For you as an investor, this move relates to how Arthur J. Gallagher is building out its core brokerage and risk management franchise. The company is expanding its presence in the UK...
